consequence: Gap_{w,k}(z)>=0 for all z>=0, with equality at z=1 or the trivial zero cases. Thus every two-level threshold direction is certified exactly.
name: Exact all two-level shell gap certificate
normalization: Gap_{w,k}(z)=A_w(1)(k z^2+24-k)^(w/2)-24^(w/2) sum_j N_j z^j, where N_j counts shell blocks meeting the k-threshold support in j coordinates.
scope: Two-level threshold directions only. This does not prove arbitrary multilevel directions.
statement: For every Golay shell w in {8,12,16,24} and every two-level threshold support size k=0..24, the shell-domination gap polynomial factors as (z-1)^2 Q_{w,k}(z) with Q_{w,k} having nonnegative integer coefficients.
